basic_operations.name: Health Check
basic_operations.query: Check TaskHQ server health and connectivity
basic_operations.description: Verifies server is operational and returns status

basic_operations.name: Server Information
basic_operations.query: Show me server configuration and my user context
basic_operations.description: Returns server config, user ID, company ID, and capabilities

board_management.name: List My Boards
board_management.query: Show me all my accessible boards
board_management.description: Returns list of boards user has access to

board_management.name: Board Analysis
board_management.query: Analyze board 'clx1y2z3a4b5c6d7e8f9' and show detailed statistics
board_management.description: Comprehensive board analytics with task counts, completion rates, sections

board_management.name: Board Optimization
board_management.description: AI-powered recommendations for improving board performance

board_management.name: Compare Boards
board_management.query: Compare completion rates between boards 'board1-id' and 'board2-id' for this month
board_management.description: Performance comparison across multiple boards with metrics

task_search.name: Semantic Search
task_search.query: Find all tasks related to user authentication and login issues
task_search.description: AI-powered vector search for semantically related tasks

task_search.name: Priority Search
task_search.query: Show me all high priority tasks in the development board
task_search.description: Search with priority and board filters

task_search.name: Hybrid Search
task_search.query: Find tasks containing 'API bug' using both keyword and semantic matching
task_search.description: Combined vector and keyword search for better accuracy

task_search.name: Similar Tasks
task_search.description: Vector similarity search based on existing task

analytics_insights.name: Embedding Status
analytics_insights.query: Check the status of AI embeddings in my workspace
analytics_insights.description: Shows embedding coverage and vector search readiness

analytics_insights.name: Vector Search Health
analytics_insights.query: Verify that vector search is working properly
analytics_insights.description: Health check specifically for AI search capabilities

analytics_insights.name: Workspace Overview
analytics_insights.query: Give me an overview of my workspace performance
analytics_insights.description: Comprehensive workspace analysis using multiple tools

complex_workflows.name: Project Health Report
complex_workflows.query: Generate a comprehensive health report for all my active projects
complex_workflows.description: Multi-step analysis combining board search, individual analysis, and system health

complex_workflows.name: Task Bottleneck Analysis
complex_workflows.query: Find bottlenecks in my workflow and suggest improvements for board 'clx1y2z3a4b5c6d7e8f9'
complex_workflows.description: Workflow analysis with optimization suggestions and related task discovery

complex_workflows.name: Sprint Planning Assistant
complex_workflows.query: Help me plan the next sprint by analyzing current progress and finding related tasks
complex_workflows.description: Sprint planning using board comparison, task search, and performance metrics

complex_workflows.name: Team Productivity Analysis
complex_workflows.query: Analyze team productivity across all boards and identify optimization opportunities
complex_workflows.description: Comprehensive team analysis with multi-board comparison and optimization

troubleshooting.name: Connection Test
troubleshooting.query: Test all TaskHQ connections and verify system status

troubleshooting.name: Search Diagnostics
troubleshooting.query: Diagnose search functionality and check embedding status

requests.name: Simple Health Check
requests.curl: curl -X POST 'https://your-n8n-instance.com/webhook/taskhq-agent' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message": "Check TaskHQ server health"}'

requests.name: Board Analysis Request

body.query: Analyze board clx1y2z3a4b5c6d7e8f9 and show completion statistics

requests.curl: curl -X POST 'https://your-n8n-instance.com/webhook/taskhq-agent' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "Analyze board clx1y2z3a4b5c6d7e8f9 and show completion statistics", "board_id": "clx1y2z3a4b5c6d7e8f9"}'

requests.name: Semantic Search Request

body.message: Find all tasks related to authentication, login, and user management

requests.curl: curl -X POST 'https://your-n8n-instance.com/webhook/taskhq-agent' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message": "Find all tasks related to authentication, login, and user management", "search_options": {"threshold": 0.7, "limit": 15}}'

success_response.format: AI agent response with tool results
success_response.example:
✅ **TaskHQ Health Check Complete**

**Server Status**: Healthy
**Features Available**:
- AI Features: ✅ Enabled
- MCP Tools: ✅ Enabled  
- Vector Search: ✅ Enabled

**Your Context**:
- User ID: user_123
- Company ID: company_456
- Authenticated: ✅ Yes

**Available Capabilities**: health_check, server_info, board management, semantic search, and more.

Your TaskHQ system is ready for use! 🚀

testing_checklist.validation: Agent processes queries and calls MCP tools
Board and task operations work correctly
Invalid requests return proper error responses
